system_definitions.INTEREST_VECTOR_DOMINANCE: This POI matches the family's interest tags very strongly (interest score > 1.2)
system_definitions.SHARED_ANCHOR_REQUIRED: This POI serves as a skeletal/anchor point that enables coordination between multiple families traveling together
system_definitions.OPTIMIZER_SELECTED: This POI was selected by the optimizer with moderate interest (score 0.8-1.2)
system_definitions.OPTIMIZER_TRADEOFF: This POI was added despite low interest because it optimizes other factors (time, routing, etc.)
system_definitions.TRANSPORT_ROUTING_OPTIMIZATION: The route/POI selection was optimized due to transport changes
system_definitions.BUS_UNAVAILABLE: BUS transport is unavailable (strike, closure, etc.)
system_definitions.TRANSPORT_DISRUPTED: The original transport mode was disrupted
system_definitions.ROUTE_REROUTED: Successfully found an alternative transport mode
system_definitions.ROUTE_OPTIMIZED: Route was optimized for better efficiency (no disruption)
system_definitions.LOW_INTEREST_DROPPED: This POI was removed because it has low relevance to the family's interests (score < 0.8)
system_definitions.OBJECTIVE_DOMINATED: This POI was removed due to optimization tradeoffs (cost, time, or other constraints outweighed its value)
